title: Laurie Levesque
content:
People.ContactEmail lalevesque@mtiplus.ca
Laurie is a paralegal in the immigration law team in our Quebec office. She assists our clients who are part of temporary residency programs, namely the International Mobility Program and the Temporary Foreign Worker Program. Her practice also covers the various permanent residency programs in Canada.
Laurie holds a bachelor's degree in criminology from Université Laval (2018) and a certificate in law (2021). She is fluent in both French and English.
